title: Build a labeled retrieval evaluation set
description: Assemble queries with judged relevant documents so recall and precision can gate every index or model change.
body: Use before tuning any vector retrieval system. Do not tune by eyeballing a few queries — you cannot detect regressions or compare options without measured recall/precision. Actions: collect representative queries, label relevant documents per query, and compute recall@k and precision@k as the standard gate. Validation signals include a labeled query set with relevance judgments and a baseline recall/precision recorded before changes. Risk boundary: tuning without an eval ships silent regressions; if no labeled set exists, escalate to build one before approving index or embedder changes that affect production retrieval.
